code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});export const uploadResumes=files=>{const form=new FormData();files.forEach(f=>form.append('resumes',f));return API.post('/upload',form,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});};export const matchCandidates=(candidates,requiredSkills,jobDescription,minExperience)=>API.post('/match',{candidates,required_skills:requiredSkills,job_description:jobDescription,min_experience:minExperience});export const parseJD=text=>API.post('/parse-jd',{text});export const healthCheck=()=>API.get('/health');export const getSampleCandidates=()=>API.get('/samples');
